component.name: Bootable
component.summary: Write bootable ISO and disk images to removable media

description.p: Bootable is a small GTK4 / libadwaita application for writing bootable USB drives from ISO or raw disk image files. It supports Linux isohybrid images (DD mode), Windows ISOs (UEFI and BIOS), optional live-media persistence, checksum and signature verification, and a dry-run mode.

ul.li: GPT or MBR partitioning with UEFI, BIOS, or hybrid boot
Optional SHA-256 checksum and GPG signature verification
Optional ext4 persistence partition for live media
Refuses to overwrite anything mounted on a system path
